title: Mini-fousta kai karate
writer: Vasilis Andreopoulos, Dimitris Giannoukakis, Giorgos Vrasivanopoulos
actors: Giorgos Pantzas, Eleni Prokopiou, Sapfo Notara
plot: A tenant who wants to write an armed forces officer's biography falls head over heels with his beautiful niece instead. As his friend falls in love with the same girl, they all meet with his sour landlady. But, can one put love on...
